headlines.headline: Yorven Labs names new head of enterprise software division

sentiment.reasoning: The appointment of a new division head is a standard leadership change with neutral immediate impact on financial performance.

sentiment.reasoning: Industry awards provide positive brand sentiment but have limited direct impact on financial metrics.

headlines.headline: Ixenix Technologies revises long-term strategy with focus on automated logistics

headlines.headline: Ulvyn Microchips announces $3.8B share buyback program

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
